rationale: In the citing paper, Dinner et al. (2014) is cited only once in the endogeneity section as part of a grouped parenthetical list of "recent applications" of a cross-market instrumental-variables approach. The actual methodological justification is attributed to Hausman (1997) and Nevo (2001), and the citing paper does not discuss or rely on Dinner et al.'s specific model, findings, or mechanisms. This indicates a background/example citation rather than a distinct functional dependency.
